description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a classic cylindrical shape and a rounded handle attached to one side. The cup features a blue and black street sign graphic with the words 'MAIN ST SHOPPING' on one side, and a blue hexagonal logo with the text 'ARknet' on the other. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly. The handle is ergonomically curved, allowing for a comfortable grip. The cup's interior is plain and unadorned, matching the exterior's white color. The branding and graphics make it suitable for promotional or themed urban settings.
description: A white ceramic cup with a rounded handle, featuring blue and black street sign graphics and 'ARknet' branding. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with the handle on the right and a partial view of the 'MAIN ST SHOPPING' street sign graphic visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the 'ARknet' logo and text, with the handle on the left side of the cup.
description_view_2: The cup is rotated to show the continuation of the 'ARknet' text, with no handle visible.
description_view_3: The 'MAIN ST SHOPPING' street sign graphic is fully visible, with the handle positioned at the back right.
